import os
path = r'C:\Users\Revexn\Desktop\antigravity\seconde-exp'
# Read ONLY root-level files (no recursion)
for f in os.listdir(path):
    fp = os.path.join(path, f)
    if os.path.isfile(fp):
        try:
            with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as fh:
                content = fh.read()
                print(f'=== {f} ({len(content)} chars) ===')
                print(content[:3000])
                print()
        except: pass
# Also read .agent/ files
agent_dir = os.path.join(path, '.agent')
if os.path.isdir(agent_dir):
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(agent_dir):
        for f in files:
            fp = os.path.join(root, f)
            try:
                with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as fh:
                    content = fh.read()
                    rel = os.path.relpath(fp, path)
                    print(f'=== {rel} ({len(content)} chars) ===')
                    print(content[:3000])
                    print()
            except: pass
# Also check .github/workflows/
gh_dir = os.path.join(path, '.github')
if os.path.isdir(gh_dir):
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(gh_dir):
        for f in files:
            fp = os.path.join(root, f)
            try:
                with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as fh:
                    content = fh.read()
                    rel = os.path.relpath(fp, path)
                    print(f'=== {rel} ({len(content)} chars) ===')
                    print(content[:3000])
                    print()
            except: pass
# Check .vscode/
vs_dir = os.path.join(path, '.vscode')
if os.path.isdir(vs_dir):
    for f in os.listdir(vs_dir):
        fp = os.path.join(vs_dir, f)
        if os.path.isfile(fp):
            try:
                with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as fh:
                    content = fh.read()
                    print(f'=== .vscode/{f} ({len(content)} chars) ===')
                    print(content[:3000])
                    print()
            except: pass
description: قراءة ملفات الجذر و .agent و .github و .vscode فقط (بدون .venv و agent/skills)
